physical_anchor: Voice-only, disembodied presence — no body on screen, no face, no gesture. If anchored at all, the listener imagines a figure standing alone at the edge of a summer field, hat in hand, a single plucked thistle dropped at his boots.
vocal_quality: Warm, slightly weathered baritone with unhurried, periodic cadence and sudden rhetorical lifts; educated 19th-century Russian gentry register, reverent and morally weighted rather than sentimental.
social_presence: Occupies the room as a quiet elder chronicler — no menace, no performance; authority comes from stillness, long looking, and the sense that he has walked the ground he describes.
